activity.description: A player is about to shoot. In the background, we can see the goalkeeper, and to the left, two defenders. They are playing on a grass field.
activity.open_question: Look at the image. Describe what is happening in your own words. What do you think will happen next?

questions.sentence: The player is preparing to __________ the ball towards the goal.
In the background, the __________ is ready to stop the shot.
The game is taking place on a __________ field.
To the left of the image, we can see two __________ trying to block the player.
The main action in the image is a player attempting to __________ at the goal.
